sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81170" key="peribronta/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιβροντάομαι</orth>, <sense id="n81170.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">resound with thunder</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὁ κόσμος ἐν κύκλῳ περιεβροντᾶτο</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Erotic.Fragm.Papyr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.20</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> Lavagnini.</sense> </entryFree>
